100101110110101111111010011011001001110101011010010100011001111011110000000101010 - ASI: 32

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  010 = 0 * 10
  1110 = 11 * 10
  1111 = 11 * 11
  00001 = 00 * 001
  00110 = 001 * 10
  01010 = 010 * 10
  10010 = 10 * 010
  11001 = 11 * 001
  11010 = 11 * 010
  11101 = 1110 * 1
  111000 = 1110 * 00
  0011001 = 00 * 11001
  0011101 = 00 * 11101
  01011010 = 010 * 11010
  100101110 = 10010 * 1110
  110101111 = 11010 * 1111
  0000101010 = 00001 * 01010
  1110100110 = 11101 * 00110
  11101111000 = 11101 * 111000
  010100011001 = 01010 * 0011001
  110010011101 = 11001 * 0011101
  100101110110101111 = 100101110 * 110101111
  01011010010100011001 = 01011010 * 010100011001
  111011110000000101010 = 11101111000 * 0000101010
  1110100110110010011101 = 1110100110 * 110010011101
  1001011101101011111110100110110010011101 = 100101110110101111 * 1110100110110010011101
  01011010010100011001111011110000000101010 = 01011010010100011001 * 111011110000000101010
  100101110110101111111010011011001001110101011010010100011001111011110000000101010 = 1001011101101011111110100110110010011101 * 01011010010100011001111011110000000101010
